Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like this door leads outside[n]to the practice field.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The track team seems to use[n]it for practice after school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...They're not recruiting new[n]members at the moment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2078 0 0}This leads out to the practice field.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's pretty much just the track team that uses it. Apparently, it's top-of-the-line in terms of quality.[n]{f 1 1}
